text:

author: Disney YouTube
text:
D23: Where Disney Fans Belong
D23 is where Disney fans belong. If you’re a fan of around-the-year events, discounts on Parks, advanced screenings of the biggest blockbusters, and exclusive sweepstakes, D23 is what you’ve been looking for.  Join the community that shares your passion for parks, characters, merch, and more!  With a D23 Gold Membership, you unlock the ultimate access to curated experiences that bring you behind-the-scenes and closer to the magic than ever before!
